context.summary: A wireless alarm to warn you when someone opens a door ГўВҖВ“ or leaves it open.
how_it_works: The transmitter program uses the micro:bitГўВҖВҷsГӮ compassГӮ (magnetometer)ГӮ input sensor and aГӮ loopГӮ to measure the strength of the magnetic field every two seconds.

It usesГӮ selectionГӮ so when the magnetic field strength falls below a certain level (the threshold), it sends aГӮ radioГӮ signal ГўВҖВҳopenГўВҖВҷ. If the magnetism reading goes above the threshold, it sends the signal ГўВҖВҳclosed'.

When the receiver micro:bit receives the signal ГўВҖВҳopenГўВҖВҷ, a cross appears on its LED display and an audible alarm sounds. When it receives the signal ГўВҖВҳclosedГўВҖВҷ, a tick appears on its LED display and no sound plays.
improve_it: Use multiple micro:bits to track the status of different doors by sending different radio messages, e.g. ГўВҖВҳback door openГўВҖВҷ.
Use a variable to measure how long doors are left open ГўВҖВ“ could this help you save heating energy?

code.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=17)
radio.on()

while True:
    if button_a.was_pressed():
        display.scroll(compass.get_field_strength())
    if compass.get_field_strength() < 100000:
        display.show(Image.DIAMOND_SMALL)
        radio.send('open')
    else:
        display.clear()
        radio.send('closed')
    sleep(2000)
